TITLE: Contradictory parking and clean-air pilot

Clause A: From 1 September 2026, the city will prohibit all private cars from entering the central clean-air district between 07:00 and 19:00 every weekday.

Clause B: From 1 September 2026, the city will guarantee unrestricted private-car access to every street in the same central clean-air district at all times, including weekdays between 07:00 and 19:00.

Clause C: The pilot is described as revenue-neutral and will not charge any user fees.

Clause D: The same pilot will fund itself entirely through a new daily access charge on every private car entering the district.

Stakeholders named in the memo include residents, disabled drivers, taxi drivers, small retailers, delivery companies, schools, public-health advocates and the city transport authority.
